title: Neural Network From Scratch
challenge: Modern deep learning libraries abstract away the mathematics, making it difficult to understand how neural networks actually learn.
solution: Implemented a complete feed-forward neural network using only NumPy, manually coding forward propagation, backpropagation, and the Adam optimizer.
results: Created a transparent codebase demystifying deep learning mechanics
Achieved stable convergence on multi-class classification tasks
Implemented modular architecture with reusable layers and activation functions
learnings: Mathematical foundations of deep learning including matrix multiplication and the chain rule
Implementation of optimization algorithms like Adam from scratch
Structuring machine learning code for modularity without framework dependencies
